Settings.title: Ship Settings
Settings.logoutText: Are you sure you want to abandon ship?

PrivacyScreen.intro: At TaskBlast, yer privacy matters to us. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices ye have. Please read it carefully.

informationCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationCollect.body: We collect information ye provide when creating an account, such as yer name, email address, and date of birth. Fer child accounts, a parent or guardian must authorize the account. We also collect usage data such as tasks completed, time spent in focus sessions, and in-app purchases to improve yer experience.

howUse.title: How We Use Yer Information
howUse.body: Yer information be used to provide and improve the TaskBlast service, personalize yer experience, send notifications ye opted into, and maintain account security. We do not sell yer personal data to third parties.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.body: We do not share yer personal information with third parties except as required by law or to provide core app functionality (e.g., Firebase authentication and cloud storage). Any third-party services we use be bound by their own privacy policies.

security.title: Data Security
security.body: We use industry-standard encryption and Firebase security rules to protect yer data. Access to personal information be restricted to authorized crew only. However, no method of transmission over the internet be 100% secure.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.body: TaskBlast be designed fer users of all ages. Accounts fer users under 13 be managed by a parent or guardian through the managed account feature. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 without verified parental consent.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: We may send push notifications related to task reminders and app updates. Ye can manage yer notification preferences at any time in the Settings menu.

rights.title: Yer Rights
rights.body: Ye may request access to, correction of, or deletion of yer personal data at any time by contacting us. Ye may also delete yer account directly from the app, which will remove all associated data from our systems.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify ye of any significant changes via email or an in-app notification. Continued use of TaskBlast after changes take effect constitutes yer acceptance of the revised policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: If ye have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at kryptocapstone@gmail.com. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 5 business days.

SupportScreen.title: Help & Support
SupportScreen.intro: Need help navigatin' the Solar System? Browse the FAQs below or get in touch with our crew directly.
SupportScreen.responseTime: We aim to respond to all enquiries within 5 business days.

1.question: How do I add a new task?
1.answer: Tap the task icon on the Home screen to open yer Task List. Then tap 'Add New Task', fill in the task name, optional description, and a rock reward, and tap 'Add Task' to save it.

2.question: How do focus sessions work?
2.answer: TaskBlast uses the Pomodoro technique - alternatin' work and play cycles. Select a task and tap 'Take Off' to start a session. Ye can pause or land early at any time, and ye'll earn rocks upon completion.

3.question: What be Rocks and Galaxy Crystals?
3.answer: Rocks be earned by completin' tasks and focus sessions. Galaxy Crystals be a premium currency rewarded through level-up milestones. Both can be spent in the Shop to unlock avatar customizations.

4.question: How do I create a child account?
4.answer: From yer Profile screen, tap 'Add Child Account'. Ye'll be prompted to set up a managed account with a Manager PIN. The child can then select their profile from the Profile Selection screen.

5.question: I forgot me Manager PIN. What do I do?
5.answer: Currently, Manager PINs be stored securely on yer account. Please contact us at {{email}} with yer registered email address and we'll help ye regain access.

6.question: How do I change the app language?
6.answer: Go to Settings and tap 'Language'. Ye can choose from English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Russian, Arabic, Bengali, Chinese, Hindi, and Pirate.

7.question: The app looks different - what be colour-blind modes?
7.answer: In Settings, tap 'Accessibility' to find colour-blind-safe themes (Deuteranopia, Protanopia, Tritanopia, Achromatopsia) as well as high-contrast mode and reduced motion toggles.

8.question: How do I turn off notifications?
8.answer: Go to Settings and tap 'Notifications'. Ye can toggle individual notification types on or off at any time.

9.question: How do I delete me account?
9.answer: To request account deletion, please contact us at {{email}} from yer registered email address. We will process yer request within 5 business days and remove all associated data.

AboutScreen.title: About
AboutScreen.tagline: Blast off. Stay focused. Level up.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: TaskBlast was built to make productivity fun. We believe that focus and accomplishment shouldn't feel like a chore, so we wrapped them in a space adventure. Our mission is to help learners of all ages build healthy habits through gamified task management.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.body: Add tasks, blast off into focus sessions powered by the Pomodoro technique, and land on new planets as you complete your goals. Earn Rocks and Galaxy Crystals, level up, and unlock cosmetic rewards along the way.

forEveryone.title: Built for Everyone
forEveryone.body: TaskBlast supports both independent learners and managed accounts for younger users. Parents and guardians can create child accounts, assign tasks, and set a manager PIN to keep things on track, all without disrupting the fun.

accessibility.title: Accessibility First
accessibility.body: We're committed to an inclusive experience. TaskBlast includes colour-blind-safe themes, high-contrast mode, adjustable text sizes, reduced motion support, and a full text-to-speech system so every user can enjoy the app comfortably.

languages.title: Multi-Language Support
languages.body: TaskBlast is available in English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Russian, Arabic, Bengali, Chinese, Hindi, and even Pirate. We're continuously working to expand our language support.

privacy.title: Privacy & Safety
privacy.body: We take your data seriously. TaskBlast uses Firebase's industry-standard security infrastructure and never sells your personal information. Child accounts are fully managed by parents or guardians.

credits.title: Credits
credits.body: Rotating Pixel Art Earth by j_hyde on opengameart.org
